modes.endless-desc: Equal matches, avoid rematches, play indefinitely

tournament.endlessHint: Click the winner to auto-generate the next match.
tournament.endlessHintSub: Press "Back to Start" when you're done.

policy.termsContent:
# Terms of Service

Last updated: March 29, 2026

## 1. Overview

Testament ("the Service") is a free web application that helps generate tournament brackets.

## 2. Terms of Use

- The Service is free for both individuals and organizations.
- No account registration is required.

## 3. Disclaimer

- The Service is provided without any warranty.
- The operator is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this Service.
- Availability and continuity of the Service are not guaranteed.

## 4. Prohibited Activities

The following activities are prohibited:

- Unauthorized access to or interference with the Service
- Use for purposes that violate applicable laws

## 5. Changes and Termination

The operator may change or terminate the Service without prior notice.

## 6. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Japan.
policy.privacyContent:
# Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 29, 2026

## 1. Information We Collect

This Service does not collect any personal information.

Data such as participant names you enter is processed only in your browser's memory and is not sent to any server.

## 2. Analytics

This Service uses Cloudflare Web Analytics to understand usage patterns.

- No cookies are used.
- No personally identifiable information is collected.
- Data collected: page views, browser and OS type, country/region, referring URL. IP addresses are anonymized.
- Collected data is sent to Cloudflare, Inc. servers. Please refer to Cloudflare's privacy policy at cloudflare.com for details.

## 3. Input Data

- No persistence — All input data is deleted when you close the page.
- No external transmission — Participant names and other input data are never sent externally.

## 4. Third-Party Sharing

Input data is never shared with third parties.

## 5. Contact

For inquiries about this policy, please use the Issues section of the Service's repository.

## 6. Changes

This policy may be changed without prior notice.
